title: Sentiment Dented By Hawkish Comments From Fed
section_path: Sentiment Dented By Hawkish Comments From Fed
section_path_text: Sentiment Dented By Hawkish Comments From Fed
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Hawkish comments from central bankers weighed on sentiment across markets. The subsequent risk off tone saw commodities come under pressure. Crude oil extended losses after Fed Chair Jerome Powell warned that the central bank may need to raise rates faster than expected, and to a higher endpoint.
